name: @rozie-ui/combobox
comment:exports: vendorable: true (D-02 / P3). A vendorable primitive exposes its canonical .rozie source under a STABLE subpath so the D-07 <components> specifier `@rozie-ui/combobox/Combobox.rozie` resolves via ProducerResolver (enhanced-resolve, exportsFields:['exports']) for every NON-codegen consumer — the VR harness, the IDE LSP, and any consumer that compiles the composite from raw source. command-palette vendors this primitive (P3/D-03). Codegen itself remaps the specifier to the local vendored sibling in-memory before compile.

scripts.typecheck: echo 'meta-pkg: pure-Rozie source; the emitted leaves typecheck individually, the surface gate runs under vitest'

comment:headless-core-devdep: Phase 64 (D-06 / P3): @rozie-ui/headless-core is a SOURCE-ONLY workspace package whose `listCore.rzts` script-partial (the option resolvers) DISSOLVES into this family's compiled leaves via inlineScriptPartials() at compile — zero runtime dependency. devDependency (cross-package bare-specifier import resolved at compile-time via the producer exports map; the 64-01 mechanism, no tsconfig paths needed).
comment:virtual-core-dep: Phase 64 (P4 / SC-5): @tanstack/virtual-core is the framework-agnostic windowing state machine the shared windowing.rzts math drives (the data-table precedent — NO per-framework adapter). The compiled leaves import it at runtime when `virtual` is on, so it is a peerDependency of each leaf; here it is a devDependency so the source resolves for codegen + the VR build.
comment:vue-mount-devdeps: seedQuery behavioral test (mount-and-drive, the captcha model-param-shadow.vue.test.ts precedent): imports the committed leaf packages/vue/src/Combobox.vue and mounts it via plain `vue` createApp/h — @vitejs/plugin-vue transforms the SFC, happy-dom supplies the DOM. Versions mirror @rozie-ui/captcha's devDependencies exactly (already-resolved workspace versions, not new packages).
